items.title: Anthropic launches an early-warning system for potential AI-driven destruction of white-collar jobs, says it shows "limited evidence" of AI-led job loss so far (Courtenay Brown/Axios)
items.title_en: Anthropic launches an early-warning system for potential AI-driven destruction of white-collar jobs, says it shows "limited evidence" of AI-led job loss so far (Courtenay Brown/Axios)
items.title_zh: Anthropic 推出了一个预警系统，以应对人工智能驱动的白领工作岗位可能受到的破坏，并表示，迄今为止，该系统显示了人工智能导致的失业的“有限证据”（Courtenay Brown/Axios）
